displayNameZh: 三大 AI 设计情境逐步揭示
summary: Yt Three Questions component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「三大 AI 设计情境逐步揭示」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-three-questions/src/YtThreeQuestions.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtThreeQuestions` and `ytThreeQuestionsDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Three Questions Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-three-questions to my project. Preserve the exported YtThreeQuestionsProps API and register the YtThreeQuestions composition with the default props.
